/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -DNDEBUG  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/test_roslz4.dir/test/roslz4_test.cpp.o  -o /home/pi/picreate/Create2/ws/devel_isolated/roslz4/lib/roslz4/test_roslz4   -L/home/pi/picreate/Create2/ws/build_isolated/roslz4/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pi/picreate/Create2/ws/build_isolated/roslz4/gtest:/home/pi/picreate/Create2/ws/build_isolated/roslz4/gtest/googlemock/gtest:/home/pi/picreate/Create2/ws/devel_isolated/roslz4/lib gtest/googlemock/gtest/libgtest.so /home/pi/picreate/Create2/ws/devel_isolated/roslz4/lib/libroslz4.so -lpthread -llz4
